title: Review — Pattern in Issue
description: Analyses the proportion of New, Repeated, and Recurring issues across the current and up to 3 previous audit schedules, with sub-audit recurrence ranking and risk-level concentration focus.

currentScheduleId.description: Unique identifier of the current (most recent) audit schedule being analysed.

auditee.description: Name of the auditee entity for which this pattern analysis is generated.

mainAuditType.description: Name of the main audit type this schedule belongs to (e.g., 'Branch Audit', 'Compliance Audit').

previousSchedulesAvailable.description: Count of previous schedules present in this payload. 0 = current only; 1–3 = that many previous schedules also available. Equals schedules.length - 1.

schedules.description: Issue pattern breakdown per schedule as an ordered array. Index 0 is always the current (most recent) schedule. Subsequent items are previous schedules in reverse chronological order: index 1 = most recent previous, index 2 = two schedules ago, index 3 = three schedules ago. Length is always previousSchedulesAvailable + 1.

subAuditRecurrence.description: Sub-audit level recurrence analysis for the current schedule only. Items are pre-ranked by combined Recurring + Repeated percentage (highest first).

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this section represents.

items.description: Sub-audits in the current schedule ranked descending by combinedRecurringRepeatedPercent.

riskConcentration.description: Measures whether recurring/repeated issues are disproportionately concentrated in critical risk categories (High + Zero Tolerance) in the current schedule.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this section computes.

totalIssues.description: Total issues in the current schedule. Denominator for overallCriticalPercent.

totalRecurringRepeated.description: Total issues classified as Recurring or Repeated in the current schedule. Denominator for recurringCriticalPercent.

totalCriticalRisk.description: Total issues with High or Zero Tolerance risk level in the current schedule.

criticalRecurringCount.description: Issues that are BOTH (Recurring or Repeated) AND (High or Zero Tolerance risk). The intersection count.

recurringCriticalPercent.description: Percentage of recurring+repeated issues that are critical risk. Formula: (criticalRecurringCount / totalRecurringRepeated) × 100. Rounded to 1 decimal.

overallCriticalPercent.description: Percentage of ALL issues that are critical risk. Formula: (totalCriticalRisk / totalIssues) × 100. Rounded to 1 decimal.

concentrationIndex.description: Difference in percentage points: recurringCriticalPercent − overallCriticalPercent. Positive = recurring issues are more concentrated in critical risk than the overall mix. Rounded to 1 decimal.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this payload was generated.

SchedulePatternMetrics.description: Issue pattern breakdown (New / Repeated / Recurring) for one audit schedule.

scheduleId.description: Unique identifier for this audit schedule. Use this as the label when narrating.

totalIssues.description: Total issue count for this schedule. Denominator for all percentage fields within this object.

newIssues.description: Issues that appear for the first time in this schedule (Pattern Type = New).

repeated.description: Issues that appeared in one previous schedule (Pattern Type = Repeated).

recurring.description: Issues that have appeared across two or more previous schedules (Pattern Type = Recurring).

combinedRecurringRepeated.description: Pre-computed combined count and percentage of Recurring + Repeated issues. Represents all non-first-time issues in this schedule.

SubAuditRecurrenceItem.description: Recurrence metrics for a single sub-audit within the current schedule.

rank.description: Rank of this sub-audit by combinedRecurringRepeatedPercent descending (rank 1 = highest recurrence rate).

totalIssues.description: Total issues in this sub-audit in the current schedule.

recurringCount.description: Count of Recurring issues in this sub-audit.

repeatedCount.description: Count of Repeated issues in this sub-audit.
